project_type: Monorepo with 16 Next.js frontend apps, shared packages, and Fastify backend services
build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo. typecheck depends on ^build, test depends on ^build
test_framework: Vitest with @testing-library/react, jsdom environment. Tests in packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck (111/111 must pass), then pnpm build (88/88 must pass). Tests via pnpm test.
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. Use host-based validation only. pnpm store already populated.
contribution_requirements: No breaking changes to existing component APIs. Animations must be progressive/optional. Must respect prefers-reduced-motion. GPU-accelerated animations only (transform/opacity).
key_patterns: Components are React FC with explicit Props interfaces. Barrel exports in index.ts files. Brand tokens in @quant/brand (spring, easing, duration). shared-ui already has AnimationEngine class in advanced/animation-engine.ts (imperative, non-React). Styling uses Tailwind CSS utility classes. tsconfig uses composite references, JSX react-jsx.
directory_structure: packages/shared-ui/src/components/{Layout,Navigation,States,Shell,Form,AI,Chat,Feed,Media,Onboarding,quant-live} - packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/ has imperative engines - packages/brand/src/ has design tokens (motion.ts, colors.ts, typography.ts) - apps/{quantcalendar,quantdocs,quantdrive,quantmeet}/src/components/ are the 4 new frontend apps
